name: Amplified Reflexes
additional_info: Increases the self damage from casting Electrify from 5% of your current health to 15% of your current health. Increases Electrify's cooldown to 2 minutes. While Amped, your walk speed will be increased by 50% and your climb height will be increased by 15%.
desc: Amped now grants enhanced speed and parkour, but triples the self-damage on use and doubles its cooldown.
